elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts: AD 1730 - Pilgrimage of O'Carolan, "the last of the bards." (Tradition tells how though blind he recognised the friend of his youth, Bridget Cruise, by the touch of her hand as she helped him out of the boat) (about)
